overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk along a desert highway toward Night City during golden hour. The scene features sparse traffic, industrial power infrastructure, a distinctive stadium structure, and the futuristic skyline of the city in the distance with warm desert lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with industrial infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder of the highway toward the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the highway moving away from the camera

entered.detail: tall industrial electricity pylons with multiple cables running parallel to the road
two-lane paved highway stretching toward the city
large circular industrial stadium or arena with a distinctive bowl shape
futuristic cyberpunk city skyline with tall buildings and neon lights visible in the distance
sparse desert vegetation and dry bushes along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway during golden hour, with the camera walking along the dirt shoulder. Industrial power lines run parallel to the road on the left, while a massive stadium structure looms nearby. The futuristic skyline of Night City is visible in the far distance, backlit by the setting sun.

events.description: large pickup truck passes closely on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as vehicles pass by on the road

notable_agents.action: pickup truck driving past the camera on the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the desert highway as the stadium structure passes out of view behind. A large pickup truck drives past on the right, and the power lines draw closer as the city skyline remains visible ahead.

events.description: moves off the paved highway into the desert scrub and vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through desert vegetation off the main road, approaching the city from the scrubland

entered.detail: distinctive desert trees with spiky leaves scattered through the landscape
elevated highway ramp or overpass structure on the right side
dense dry grass and desert plants at ground level

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the paved road and moves through desert scrubland filled with Joshua trees and dry vegetation. The city skyline becomes more prominent as the highway overpass appears on the right, and the power lines remain visible to the left.

events.description: returns to the asphalt highway from the desert scrubland

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved highway with vehicles passing in both directions

notable_agents.action: multiple cars driving along the highway toward and away from the camera

entered.detail: returned to the paved multi-lane road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the asphalt highway and continues toward the city. The power lines are now much closer on the left, and several vehicles are visible on the road ahead. The desert vegetation gives way to the paved surface as the city skyline grows larger.

events.description: approaching a road intersection and preparing to turn left

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and beginning to turn left onto a different road

notable_agents.action: vehicles waiting or moving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: junction where multiple roads meet with vehicles present
stationary vehicles visible near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a highway intersection with vehicles visible ahead. The road curves to the left as the camera prepares to turn, with the main highway continuing straight while the camera veers onto a different route. The power lines continue alongside the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desert highway that gradually draws closer to the towering skyline of Night City during the golden hour. It begins on a dirt shoulder beside industrial power lines and a massive stadium structure, with the distant city backlit by the setting sun. As the stadium fades from view and a large pickup truck passes by, the camera veers off the pavement into scrubland filled with Joshua trees and dry vegetation. The scene then shifts back onto the asphalt as the city skyline grows more prominent and the power lines draw closer to the left. Finally, the camera approaches a highway intersection where the road curves, veering away from the main straight path toward the expanding urban horizon.
